steps.title: Choose a possessive
steps.content: The phrase compares the Mari Republic with peer autonomous Soviet socialist republics. The blank needs a possessive pronoun referring to the singular Mari Republic.

steps.title: Reject contractions
steps.content: A means they are, C is plural, and D means it is; none gives the singular possessive form. The singular possessive pronoun correctly modifies peer republics. The answer is B.
